title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
